rulings.Case Title: RICHARD PADILLA ET AL VS. LESLIE WAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 05, 2018 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT RICHARD PADILLA, JENNIFER EMPERADOR, WILLIAM CARMICHAEL, DONALD BRANCHFLOWER, FREDY MIRANDA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cause of action for ejectment is not subject to abatement due to pending unlawful detainer actions. Moving party fails to cite a single case where ejectment cause of action was abated under the facts similar to the facts of this case. Cause of action for declaratory relief is properly stated: it is not moot, actual controversy is properly alleges; other causes of action may or may not provide adequate remedy at law, but such determination is premature at this stage of the litigation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRENT ZHU VS. JONATHAN AMBROSIO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 05, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT SILVIA MEJIA HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION DENIED. Claimant failed to sustain her burden on this post-judgment claim of right to possession. Plaintiff served a pre-judgment claim of right to possession form on August 1, 2018. Additionally no evidence was provided as indicated in September 24, 2018 minute order. = (501/REQ)
